title: docker run -d --name experience --restart unless-stopped career:latest
description:
services:
  parcours:
    image: career:lts
    deploy:
      replicas: 9
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '99.0'
          memory: 999G
    environment:
      - AMBITION=unlimited
      - COFFEE_SUPPLY=infinite
    networks:
      - professional
